title: Adarshpatel Marketing — Agriculture, Dairy Feed & Coffee Trading Website

requirements.summary: Create a branded homepage with hero section, company name, tagline, call-to-action button, and agriculture-themed background image
acceptanceCriteria: Company name 'Adarshpatel Marketing' is prominently displayed in the header/hero
Tagline mentions dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading
Hero section uses the agriculture-themed background image
A call-to-action button is visible and leads to the products section

file_operations.description: Create Hero component displaying 'Adarshpatel Marketing' as the company name, a tagline covering dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading, and a call-to-action button. Use the generated background image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1600x700.png as the full-width hero backdrop. Ensure the hero section is visually prominent and uses earthy agricultural styling.
Import and render the Hero component at the top of the main page layout. Wire the call-to-action button to scroll to the products sections.

requirements.summary: Build a Dairy Feed Products section with product cards showing name, description, and enquiry button
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Dairy Feed Products' section exists on the page
At least 3 sample product cards are displayed
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section has a relevant icon or illustration

file_operations.description: Create DairyFeedSection component that displays at least 3 dairy feed product cards. Each card should include a product name, short description, and an 'Enquire Now' button. Use the generated background image frontend/public/assets/generated/dairy-feed-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Include a relevant icon or illustration to distinguish this section.
Import and render the DairyFeedSection component after the Hero section. Ensure proper section spacing and navigation anchor for scrolling.

requirements.summary: Build an Agri Inputs section listing agricultural input products with product cards and enquiry buttons
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Agri Inputs' section exists on the page
At least 3 sample agri input product cards are shown
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section visually distinguishes itself from other product sections

file_operations.description: Create AgriInputsSection component displaying at least 3 agricultural input product cards (fertilizers, pesticides, seeds, etc.). Each card should include product name, short description, and an 'Enquire Now' button. Use the generated background image frontend/public/assets/generated/agri-inputs-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Ensure the section visually distinguishes itself from other product sections.
Import and render the AgriInputsSection component after the DairyFeedSection. Ensure proper section spacing and navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Build a Coffee Trading section highlighting coffee trading services and varieties with product cards and enquiry buttons
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Coffee Trading' section exists on the page
At least 2–3 coffee product or service cards are displayed
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section has a visually distinct coffee-themed appearance

file_operations.description: Create CoffeeTradingSection component displaying at least 2–3 coffee product or service cards. Each card should include name, description, and an 'Enquire Now' button. Use the generated background image frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Apply a visually distinct coffee-themed appearance with warm brown tones.
Import and render the CoffeeTradingSection component after the AgriInputsSection. Ensure proper section spacing and navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Add a Contact/Enquiry section with a form capturing Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest, and Message that submits to the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form has fields: Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest (dropdown with Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading), and Message
Submitted enquiries are stored in the backend
User sees a success confirmation after submission
Form validates required fields before submission

file_operations.description: Create ContactSection component with a form containing fields for Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest (dropdown with options: Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading), and Message. Wire the form submission to call the backend submitEnquiry method using the backend interface. Validate required fields before submission. Display a success confirmation message after successful submission and handle errors gracefully.
Import and render the ContactSection component after the CoffeeTradingSection. Ensure proper section spacing and navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Apply a rich, earthy agricultural visual theme with warm greens, browns, cream tones, bold serif headings, and consistent design across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses earthy greens, browns, and cream tones
Hero section uses the full-width agriculture-themed background image
Typography uses bold, trustworthy heading styles
All sections have a cohesive visual style
Website is responsive on desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Update global styles to define a rich, earthy agricultural color palette using warm greens, deep soil browns, coffee browns, and cream/off-white tones. Define bold serif-style heading typography. Ensure no blue or purple colors are used. Add consistent section divider styling and ensure responsive design for desktop and mobile.

Extend Tailwind config with custom color variables for the earthy agricultural theme: warm greens, soil browns, coffee browns, and cream tones. Define custom font families for bold serif headings. Ensure the theme is consistent and reusable across all components.

requirements.summary: Add a sticky navigation bar with company logo/name and links to all major sections
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar displays 'Adarshpatel Marketing' brand name
Navigation links scroll to the correct sections
Navbar is sticky on scroll
Navbar is responsive and collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile

file_operations.description: Create Navbar component displaying 'Adarshpatel Marketing' as the brand name with the generated logo icon frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-icon.dim_256x256.png. Include navigation links to Home, Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading, and Contact sections. Implement smooth scrolling to section anchors. Make the navbar sticky on scroll and responsive, collapsing to a hamburger menu on mobile.
Import and render the Navbar component at the top of the application layout, above all other sections. Ensure the navbar remains sticky across all scroll positions.

requirements.summary: Render generated static images from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the website
acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image loads from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are displayed at appropriate sizes and positions
No broken image links

file_operations.description: Ensure the Hero component correctly references and displays frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1600x700.png as the full-width background image. Verify the image loads correctly and is displayed at the appropriate size.

Ensure the DairyFeedSection component correctly references and displays frontend/public/assets/generated/dairy-feed-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Verify the image loads correctly.

Ensure the AgriInputsSection component correctly references and displays frontend/public/assets/generated/agri-inputs-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Verify the image loads correctly.

Ensure the CoffeeTradingSection component correctly references and displays frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-bg.dim_800x400.png as a section background or accent. Verify the image loads correctly.

Ensure the Navbar component correctly references and displays frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-icon.dim_256x256.png as the company logo icon. Verify the image loads correctly and is displayed at an appropriate size.
